Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Unlock Flag ID
Fields.Description: Lifting flag (default 0). If this event flag is set, the ban will be lifted (displayed on the loading screen). If it is 0, the ban is always lifted. The invalid flag has priority

Fields.Name: Invalid Flag ID
Fields.Description: Invalid flag (default 0). If this event flag is set, it will be disabled (it will not be displayed on the loading screen). If it is 0, this flag is not always set.

Fields.Name: Message ID
Fields.Description: Text ID (Loading Text.xlsx). Used for both loading titles and loading text
